#  Global Fujitsu Distinguished Engineer  

![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/about/activities/global-fde/KV_banner.jpg?rev=9d470dafb2874d8da3a02cd3ddd07ae3&hash=778901E55ABB932BC31FEC48F016B5FB)
The "Global Fujitsu Distinguished Engineer(Global-FDE)" program certifies engineers who have outstanding technical skills in fields important to Fujitsu's future business growth strategy, and contribute to business strategy and provide added value to customers.  
  
As technology experts in important fields, we will solve difficult social issues and contribute to create value and realize business strategies for our customers.  
  

## Global-FDE Certified
Top engineers in each certification area help you create value and realize your business strategy  

Technology Areas in Certification
  * Hybrid IT 
  * Network 
  * Cybersecurity 
  * Data&AI 
  * Computing 


[![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/about/activities/global-fde/global-fde-badge.png?h=255&iar=0&w=255&rev=2c54fc8b750b49878c311a83bb169379&hash=33E385A21DE5E79568E9C67249B1F504)](https://www.openbadge-global.com/ns/portal/openbadge/public/assertions/detail/bHFERWQ2cU5YbUtuM0ZXVS82QTZDQT09)

## Global-FDE System
The Global-FDE program recognizes engineers who possess outstanding technical capabilities and contribute to business strategies and the provision of added value to customers in areas critical to our business growth strategy.  
Global-FDE Certified individuals receive a trophy and an open badge.  

[![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/about/activities/global-fde/global-fde-badge.png?h=255&iar=0&w=255&rev=2c54fc8b750b49878c311a83bb169379&hash=33E385A21DE5E79568E9C67249B1F504)](https://www.openbadge-global.com/ns/portal/openbadge/public/assertions/detail/bHFERWQ2cU5YbUtuM0ZXVS82QTZDQT09)
## Certification Criteria  

The profile of a certified Global FDE is an engineer who can solve extremely difficult technical problems and create new value for customers and markets.  
  
Certification shall be made in light of the following image of human resources.
(1) Outstanding technical skills
(2) Value creation  

(3) Face for Fujitsu’s technology

  3. Global Fujitsu Distinguished Engineer

Global Fujitsu Distinguished Engineer

The "Global Fujitsu Distinguished Engineer(Global-FDE)" program certifies engineers who have outstanding technical skills in fields important to Fujitsu's future business growth strategy, and contribute to business strategy and provide added value to customers.

As technology experts in important fields, we will solve difficult social issues and contribute to create value and realize business strategies for our customers.

Global-FDE Certified

Top engineers in each certification area help you create value and realize your business strategy

Technology Areas in Certification

  • Hybrid IT
  • Network
  • Cybersecurity
  • Data&AI
  • Computing

Global-FDE System

The Global-FDE program recognizes engineers who possess outstanding technical capabilities and contribute to business strategies and the provision of added value to customers in areas critical to our business growth strategy.
Global-FDE Certified individuals receive a trophy and an open badge.

Certification Criteria

The profile of a certified Global FDE is an engineer who can solve extremely difficult technical problems and create new value for customers and markets.

Certification shall be made in light of the following image of human resources.

(1) Outstanding technical skills

(2) Value creation

(3) Face for Fujitsu’s technology
